Container.Name: HotFetched
Container.Overview: Self-hosted 3D printer firmware workshop. Pick a motherboard (BTT SKR 3/EZ, SKR Mini E3 V3, Octopus, Manta M8P), import Marlin or Klipper source from GitHub or ZIP, edit the full configuration in a web UI (drivers, sensorless homing, probes, displays, boot images, startup sounds), and run confidence-gated builds where 100%% means the firmware actually compiled. Exports firmware.bin / klipper.bin plus config bundles.

Config.Name: Private data
Config.Description: SQLite DB, project sources, build artifacts. Keep on cache-only storage (NOT array/user-share) — same SQLite locking rule as FarFetched.

Config.Name: PlatformIO cache
Config.Description: Persists the STM32 toolchain (~1-2 GB) so it is not re-downloaded on container updates.
